title: Local beauty takes Miss Pearl crown
description: KNYSNA - The crowd erupted in applause as...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Gallery","html":"Gallery"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA - The crowd erupted in applause as local beauties across seven age categories were crowned Miss Pearl 2025 during a dazzling pageant held as part of this year's Knysna Oyster Festival. In a historic first for the event, the pageant also crowned the inaugural Mr Pearl.","html":"KNYSNA - The crowd erupted in applause as local beauties across seven age categories were crowned Miss Pearl 2025 during a dazzling pageant held as part of this year's Knysna Oyster Festival. In a historic first for the event, the pageant also crowned the inaugural Mr Pearl."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Organised by Ace Models Knysna and Sedgefield, the pageant took place at the scenic Knysna Waterfront on Saturday 5 July, drawing a festive crowd from across the Garden Route."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Spectators cheered on 80 contestants of all ages - from toddlers to adults - as they walked the runway with pride.","html":"Spectators cheered on 80 contestants of all ages - from toddlers to adults - as they walked the runway with pride."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"PHOTO GALLERY:  Miss Pearl 2025","html":"PHOTO GALLERY: Miss Pearl 2025"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The event featured seven official age categories:"},{"type":"list","items":["Tiny Miss Pearl (3-6 years)","Mini Miss Pearl (7-9 years)","Little Miss Pearl (10-12 years)","Pre-Teen Miss Pearl (13-15 years)","Teen Miss Pearl (16-17 years)","Miss Pearl (18+ years)","Ambassador (30+ years)"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In each category, a second princess, first princess, and the crowned title holder were recognised for their poise, stage presence and personality.","html":"In each category, a second princess, first princess, and the crowned title holder were recognised for their poise, stage presence and personality."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This year also marked a bold new step forward with the introduction of the Mr Pearl category, which welcomed young male contestants to the platform for the first time. The addition was met with enthusiastic support from both audience and participants.","html":"This year also marked a bold new step forward with the introduction of the Mr Pearl category, which welcomed young male contestants to the platform for the first time. The addition was met with enthusiastic support from both audience and participants."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Charmaine Kruger, director of Ace Models Knysna and Sedgefield, said the inclusion of Mr Pearl was a natural and important progression. \"Pageantry should be inclusive and empowering for everyone. Launching the Mr Pearl category gives more young people a space to shine, grow, and gain confidence. We're incredibly proud of all our contestants.\"","html":"Charmaine Kruger, director of Ace Models Knysna and Sedgefield, said the inclusion of Mr Pearl was a natural and important progression. \"Pageantry should be inclusive and empowering for everyone. Launching the Mr Pearl category gives more young people a space to shine, grow, and gain confidence. We're incredibly proud of all our contestants.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"To the accompaniment of heartfelt cheers, winners received sashes, crowns and gift bags as their names were announced. The celebration ended with group photos, music, and proud families capturing joyful memories.","html":"To the accompaniment of heartfelt cheers, winners received sashes, crowns and gift bags as their names were announced. The celebration ended with group photos, music, and proud families capturing joyful memories."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For the first time the Mr Pearl category was introduced this year, which welcomed young male contestants to the platform","html":"For the first time the Mr Pearl category was introduced this year, which welcomed young male contestants to the platform"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
